dev_desc:
Developed by the DarkTube Team.
Providing a custom YouTube client experience on Nintendo Switch.
inst_desc:
1. Start the DarkTube Backend Server on your PC/NAS.
2. Input the local IP Address (e.g., 192.168.1.10) in the app.
3. Browse Trending or Search for videos directly.
welcome_desc: Please add your server IP to view videos.
server_limit_reached: Server limit reached. You can only have up to 4 servers.
